name: phase3-on-save-main
description: Review Phase 3 main.py for correctness when saved

action.message:
Phase 3 main.py was just saved. Review it for:
1. --vision flag creates CameraPolicy via create_camera_policy() — not NovaPolicy directly
2. --mock flag uses MockPolicy (no has_vision) — vision loop is NOT active in mock mode
3. Vision execution uses DeepRacerTool with event_callback for real-time vision event printing
4. asyncio.run(tool._execute_task_async(user_input)) used for vision execution
5. camera_policy.cleanup() called in finally block on exit
6. Confirmation gate: user must type 'y' or 'yes' — any other input cancels
7. print_results() accepts optional vision_events list for vision log display
8. Vision events printed in real time via _callback (not just at end)
Report any violations.
